title: hymenophyllum brachypus
intro: Hymenophyllum brachypus, also known as the short-tailed hemlock or short-tailed spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum brachypus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, it can be consumed as a tea or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
